channel.title: BrightPath Blog
channel.description: Practical writing for web creators and personal website builders.

item.title: Launch a one-page portfolio in 24 hours
item.description: Build a strong first impression with a portfolio page that tells your story quickly.

item.title: Write blog posts that feel easy
item.description: Use a repeatable structure so writing becomes a process.

item.title: Design a contact page people actually use
item.description: Clear labels and fewer fields make it easier for visitors to reach out.
